title: DeployGTM Copy Quality Rubric

dimensions.label: Entity correctness
dimensions.description: The company, person, role, and identity are resolved from trusted sources.

dimensions.label: Source-grounded specificity
dimensions.description: Specific claims trace to trusted source refs and do not invent facts.

dimensions.label: Pain and trigger relevance
dimensions.description: The message maps to a real business problem, signal, or timing reason.

dimensions.label: Message strategy fit
dimensions.description: The copy follows the approved hypothesis, angle, CTA, and blocked claims.

dimensions.label: Voice fit
dimensions.description: The copy sounds direct, practical, restrained, and operator-led.

dimensions.label: CTA quality
dimensions.description: The ask is low-friction, relevant, and easy to answer.

dimensions.label: Brevity and readability
dimensions.description: The message is tight enough for a busy buyer.

dimensions.label: Risk control
dimensions.description: The copy avoids fake certainty, unsafe personalization, and sensitive claims.

banned_phrases: I hope this finds you well
